prompts.label: 2-layer MLP with backprop
prompts.text: Train a 2-layer neural network: forward pass with ReLU, compute cross-entropy loss, backpropagate, update weights
prompts.scenario: Spam classifier — train on email features to predict spam vs. not-spam

prompts.label: CNN training loop
prompts.text: Train a CNN: convolution, pooling, ReLU activation, loss, backward pass through all layers, weight update
prompts.scenario: Defect detection — train on factory images to flag faulty parts on an assembly line

prompts.label: Config-driven training + decay
prompts.text: Config-driven training loop with weight decay and logging every 10 epochs
prompts.scenario: Predictive maintenance — schedule model retraining on sensor data with regularization to avoid overfitting

prompts.label: Transformer block training
prompts.text: Train a transformer block: multi-head attention, layer norm, forward pass, backward pass
prompts.scenario: Chatbot fine-tuning — adapt a language model to company-specific support conversations

prompts.label: TNET 500 epochs
prompts.text: Train a network using TNET with 500 epochs and learning rate 0.001
prompts.scenario: House price estimator — train on square footage, bedrooms, location to predict sale price

prompts.label: 3-layer MLP + BN + dropout
prompts.text: Train a 3-layer MLP with batch normalization after each hidden layer and dropout rate 0.2
prompts.scenario: Credit scoring — train a regularized model on applicant features where overfitting is costly

prompts.label: BN + DROP forward-backward
prompts.text: Train with BN and DROP: forward pass, batch normalize hidden activations, apply dropout, compute loss, backprop
prompts.scenario: Medical diagnosis — train on patient lab results with strong regularization for reliable predictions

prompts.label: Softmax classification
prompts.text: Run inference on input data through a trained model, apply softmax to get probabilities
prompts.scenario: Product recommendation — score candidate items and return ranked probabilities for a user

prompts.label: Transformer forward pass
prompts.text: Forward pass only: embedding lookup, attention, layer norm, output projection
prompts.scenario: Search ranking — embed a user query through a transformer to find relevant documents

prompts.label: INFER + top prediction
prompts.text: Run INFER on input, apply softmax, return top prediction
prompts.scenario: Real-time fraud detection — classify a payment transaction as legitimate or suspicious

prompts.label: Normalize + infer
prompts.text: Normalize input, run inference, return predictions without updating weights
prompts.scenario: Weather forecasting — feed today's sensor readings through a frozen model to predict tomorrow

prompts.label: Inference with BN
prompts.text: Inference with batch normalization: load input, BN normalize, linear layer, softmax (DROP rate 0.0 to disable)
prompts.scenario: Production ML serving — deploy a trained model with BN in eval mode (dropout off) for stable predictions

prompts.label: Softmax backward
prompts.text: Backpropagate through a softmax layer
prompts.scenario: Fine-tuning a classifier's final layer on a new set of categories

prompts.label: Conv backward
prompts.text: Backpropagate through a convolution layer, get input gradient and kernel gradient
prompts.scenario: Transfer learning — update only the conv filters while keeping earlier layers frozen

prompts.label: 3-layer mixed backward
prompts.text: Full backward pass through a 3-layer network: ReLU, sigmoid, softmax
prompts.scenario: Debugging gradients — verify gradient flow through different activations in a custom architecture

prompts.label: Linear layer MMULBK
prompts.text: Compute input and weight gradients for a linear layer using MMULBK
prompts.scenario: Custom optimizer research — manually compute gradients to test a novel weight update rule

prompts.label: Attention backward
prompts.text: Attention backward pass: compute Q, K, V gradients
prompts.scenario: LoRA-style adaptation — backprop through attention to update low-rank projection matrices

prompts.label: Pad + conv + pool + ReLU
prompts.text: CNN forward pass: zero-pad input, apply convolution, max pool, ReLU
prompts.scenario: Security camera — extract features from a video frame to detect motion or people

prompts.label: Image classification pipeline
prompts.text: Image classification: convolution, pooling, flatten, linear layer, softmax
prompts.scenario: Plant disease detection — photograph a leaf and classify the disease from an image

prompts.label: Conv + upscale
prompts.text: Apply convolution with stride, then upscale output back to original size
prompts.scenario: Image super-resolution — enhance a low-res satellite photo to a higher resolution

prompts.label: Grouped convolution
prompts.text: Grouped convolution forward pass with bias addition
prompts.scenario: Mobile deployment — use depthwise-separable convolutions for efficient on-device object detection

prompts.label: 4D NCHW pipeline
prompts.text: 4D NCHW vision pipeline: load batch of images, CONV with 4D kernel, POOL, BN, ReLU, flatten, classify
prompts.scenario: Autonomous driving — process a batch of camera frames through a full vision backbone for object detection

prompts.label: Encoder block
prompts.text: Transformer encoder block: multi-head attention, residual connection, layer norm, feed-forward
prompts.scenario: Sentiment analysis — encode a product review into a fixed-length representation for classification

prompts.label: Embedding + positional + attention
prompts.text: Embedding lookup for token IDs, add positional encoding, apply attention
prompts.scenario: Text generation — tokenize a prompt, add position info, and start the first attention pass

prompts.label: Self-attention QKV
prompts.text: Self-attention forward pass with Q, K, V projections
prompts.scenario: Document summarization — let each word attend to every other word to identify key sentences

prompts.label: LayerNorm + GELU + linear
prompts.text: Layer norm followed by GELU activation and linear projection
prompts.scenario: Feed-forward sublayer in a GPT-style decoder block for next-token prediction

prompts.label: MatMul + bias + ReLU
prompts.text: Matrix multiply A and B, add bias, apply ReLU, store result
prompts.scenario: Recommendation engine — multiply user embedding by item matrix to score all products

prompts.label: Gradient accumulation loop
prompts.text: Loop 100 times: accumulate gradients, update weights every 10 steps
prompts.scenario: Training with limited memory — simulate a larger batch size by accumulating gradients across mini-batches

prompts.label: Early stopping check
prompts.text: Compare loss to threshold, jump to early stopping if converged
prompts.scenario: Cloud cost control — stop training when loss plateaus to avoid wasting GPU hours

prompts.label: Dot product + scale + subtract
prompts.text: Compute dot product, scale by learning rate, subtract from weights
prompts.scenario: Manual SGD step — apply a single gradient descent update to a weight vector

prompts.label: Vector addition (MADD)
prompts.text: Add two vectors element-wise using MADD, store the result
prompts.scenario: Feature fusion — combine embeddings from two different data sources (text + image)

prompts.label: Scalar bias + mean subtraction
prompts.text: Scalar add a bias to every element using SADD, then scalar subtract a mean using SSUB
prompts.scenario: Data preprocessing — center sensor readings by subtracting the mean and adding a calibration offset

prompts.label: Sum + mean reduction
prompts.text: Reduce a tensor: sum all elements with RDUC mode 0, compute mean with mode 1
prompts.scenario: Dashboard metrics — aggregate real-time sensor values into totals and averages for monitoring

prompts.label: Clamp activations
prompts.text: Clamp activations between -1 and 1 using CLMP
prompts.scenario: Robotics control — bound motor commands to safe operating limits

prompts.label: Conditional select (WHER)
prompts.text: Conditional select: use WHER to pick values above threshold
prompts.scenario: Alert system — filter sensor readings to keep only values that exceed a danger threshold

prompts.label: CMPR mask + WHER filter
prompts.text: Create a comparison mask with CMPR, then use WHER to zero out low-confidence predictions
prompts.scenario: Autonomous vehicle — suppress weak detections below a confidence threshold before acting on them

prompts.label: FFT + frequency filter
prompts.text: Apply FFT to a signal, filter in frequency domain with FILT, then reconstruct
prompts.scenario: Audio noise removal — remove background hum from a microphone recording before speech recognition

prompts.label: Reusable linear FRAG
prompts.text: Create a reusable FRAG for a linear layer (MMUL + MADD + RELU), call it with LINK
prompts.scenario: Modular model — define a shared linear block and reuse it across multiple layers without duplicating code

prompts.label: Sign + verify program
prompts.text: Sign a program with SIGN, verify with VRFY before execution
prompts.scenario: Secure edge deployment — ensure an NML model on a remote device hasn't been tampered with

prompts.label: GATH + SCAT embeddings
prompts.text: Gather embeddings from a lookup table using GATH, scatter results back with SCAT
prompts.scenario: Knowledge graph — look up entity embeddings by ID and scatter updated representations back after training

prompts.label: Cosine distance (PROJ + DIST)
prompts.text: Compute cosine distance between two vectors using PROJ and DIST
prompts.scenario: Semantic search — rank documents by cosine similarity to a query embedding

prompts.label: META annotations
prompts.text: Add META annotations for model name, version, and author
prompts.scenario: Model registry — tag a trained model with metadata for reproducibility and audit trails

prompts.label: Training log interval
prompts.text: Set training log interval to every 10 epochs, then run config-driven training
prompts.scenario: Experiment tracking — monitor loss curves during overnight training runs to catch divergence early

prompts.label: Weight decay
prompts.text: Apply weight decay to all weight matrices before each training step
prompts.scenario: Regularization — prevent a large language model from memorizing training data verbatim

prompts.label: Frozen inference
prompts.text: Run model inference on test input without updating weights, return softmax probabilities
prompts.scenario: A/B testing — compare two model versions on the same input without modifying either

prompts.label: Full v0.9 pipeline
prompts.text: Full v0.9 training pipeline: TRAIN opcode with config tensor, TLOG, WDECAY, INFER
prompts.scenario: End-to-end ML pipeline — train, log, regularize, and run inference in a single NML program

prompts.label: Batch normalization
prompts.text: Apply batch normalization (BN) to hidden layer activations with learned gamma and beta
prompts.scenario: Stabilize training — normalize activations to reduce internal covariate shift in a deep network

prompts.label: Dropout regularization
prompts.text: Add dropout (DROP) with rate 0.3 after each hidden layer during training
prompts.scenario: Small dataset — prevent overfitting when training a model with limited labeled examples

prompts.label: BN + DROP training pipeline
prompts.text: Training pipeline with BN + DROP: forward pass, BN after MMUL+MADD, DROP before output, loss, backprop
prompts.scenario: Kaggle competition — maximize generalization on a held-out test set with BN and dropout

prompts.label: BN inference (dropout off)
prompts.text: Inference with BN but dropout disabled: BN R5 R5 R6 R7, DROP R5 R5 #0.0
prompts.scenario: Production serving — switch from training mode to eval mode by disabling dropout while keeping BN

prompts.label: N-layer TNET config
prompts.text: N-layer TNET: train a 4-layer MLP using config tensor with shape [4,3]
prompts.scenario: AutoML experiment — quickly test different network depths by changing the config tensor size

prompts.label: ITOF / FTOI conversion
prompts.text: Convert integer tensor to float with ITOF, perform computation, convert back with FTOI
prompts.scenario: Quantized inference — load int8 weights, cast to float for computation, convert predictions back to int

prompts.label: Modulo indexing
prompts.text: Compute modulo with MOD for cyclic indexing
prompts.scenario: Ring buffer — cycle through a fixed-size buffer of recent observations for a sliding-window model

prompts.label: Bitwise NOT mask
prompts.text: Bitwise NOT with BNOT for mask inversion
prompts.scenario: Attention masking — invert a padding mask so masked positions are ignored during attention

prompts.label: SYS debug print
prompts.text: System call with SYS to print intermediate values during debugging
prompts.scenario: Debugging NaN loss — print activations at each layer to find where numerical instability starts

prompts.label: Customer churn prediction
prompts.text: I have 10,000 customer records with features like tenure, monthly charges, contract type, and payment method. I want to predict which customers will cancel their subscription next month.
prompts.scenario: Advisor will recommend: binary classification, MLP with dropout for the tabular dataset

prompts.label: House price estimation
prompts.text: I have a dataset of 5,000 houses with square footage, number of bedrooms, age, and neighborhood. I need to predict the sale price.
prompts.scenario: Advisor will recommend: regression, linear or neural network depending on non-linearity

prompts.label: Manufacturing defect detection
prompts.text: I have sensor readings from a factory production line — temperature, pressure, vibration, and speed. Normal readings are abundant but defects are rare (< 2% of samples). I need to flag anomalies in real-time.
prompts.scenario: Advisor will recommend: anomaly detection, autoencoder or threshold-based approach

prompts.label: Email spam filter
prompts.text: I need to classify incoming emails as spam or not spam based on word frequencies. Speed matters more than perfect accuracy — I get 100,000 emails per day.
prompts.scenario: Advisor will recommend: binary classification, Naive Bayes for speed with text features

prompts.label: Plant disease from leaf photos
prompts.text: I have 2,000 leaf photographs labeled with one of 5 diseases. I want to build a model that can identify the disease from a new photo.
prompts.scenario: Advisor will recommend: multi-class classification, CNN for image input

prompts.label: Customer segmentation
prompts.text: I have purchase history for 50,000 customers — total spend, frequency, recency, and average order value. I want to find natural customer groups for targeted marketing. No labels exist.
prompts.scenario: Advisor will recommend: clustering, K-Means for unsupervised grouping

prompts.label: Loan default risk scoring
prompts.text: A bank wants to score loan applicants on their default risk. They have historical data on 20,000 past loans with income, credit score, loan amount, employment length, and whether the borrower defaulted. Regulators require the model to be explainable.
prompts.scenario: Advisor will recommend: binary classification, decision tree or logistic regression for interpretability

prompts.label: Product review sentiment
prompts.text: I have 10,000 product reviews and need to classify each as positive, neutral, or negative sentiment.
prompts.scenario: Advisor will recommend: multi-class classification, transformer or embedding + MLP for text

prompts.label: Energy demand forecasting
prompts.text: I have 3 years of hourly electricity consumption data for a building. I need to predict the next 24 hours of energy demand.
prompts.scenario: Advisor will recommend: time series, sliding window MLP or transformer

prompts.label: Distributed fraud scoring
prompts.text: Five bank branches each have local transaction data they cannot share. I need each branch to train a fraud detector locally and combine their results for a consensus score.
prompts.scenario: Advisor will recommend: NML Collective, TNET per worker + VOTE consensus
